Caption: Types of internal short-circuits and their simulated behaviors on a prismatic Li-ion cell. (a) Schematic of the internal short-circuits. Simulated (b) and experimental (c) local temperature variations in function of the internal short circuit on a Mesocarbon Microbeads anode and cobalt-based cathode material (LiCoO2) prismatic Li-ion cell [40].
